# Install packages
options(repos = c(CRAN = "https://cloud.r-project.org"))
devtools::install_github("hathawayj/buildings", force = TRUE)

Code 
# loading packages
library(buildings)
library(tidyverse)
library(sf)
library(ggplot2)
library(USAboundaries)
library(leaflet)
library(dplyr)
library(htmltools)
Code 
# filtering for single-family permits in US.
us_single_fam_permit <- permits %>% 
  filter(variable == "Single Family") %>% 
  filter(!StateAbbr %in% c("AK", "HI", "PR", "VI", "GU", "MP", "AS"))

# filtering for single family permits in Idaho.
idaho_single_fam_building <- permits %>% 
  filter(variable == "Single Family", StateAbbr == "ID", !StateAbbr %in% c("AK", "HI", "PR", "VI", "GU", "MP", "AS"))

Interactive Map showing total number of Single-family Building permits in Idaho.

Code 
# filtering for counties in Idaho
id_counties <- USAboundaries::us_counties(states = "Idaho", resolution = "low")

# convert countyfp to numeric
id_counties$countyfp <- as.numeric(id_counties$countyfp)

# rename the state column to statefp
id_sf_permit <- idaho_single_fam_building %>% 
  rename(countyfp = county)

# removing duplicate column "state_name"
id_counties_clean <- id_counties[, !duplicated(names(id_counties))]

# merge data for visualization
merged_counties <- id_counties_clean %>% 
  left_join(id_sf_permit, by = "countyfp") %>% 
  group_by(countyfp, name, namelsad) %>% 
  summarize(total_permits = sum(value, na.rm = TRUE))

# extract county centriods to place text labels.
county_labels <-merged_counties %>% 
  st_centroid() %>% 
  mutate(label_text = paste0(name))

# create the interactive map
pal <- colorNumeric(
  palette = "OrRd",
  domain = merged_counties$total_permits,
  na.color = "transparent"
)

leaflet(merged_counties) %>%
  addProviderTiles("CartoDB.Positron") %>%
  addPolygons(
    fillColor = ~pal(total_permits),
    weight = 0.3,
    color = "#333",
    fillOpacity = 0.8,
    smoothFactor = 0.2,
    label = ~paste0(name, ": ", scales::comma(total_permits)),
    highlightOptions = highlightOptions(weight = 1, color = "black", bringToFront = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  addLabelOnlyMarkers(
    data = county_labels,
    lng = ~st_coordinates(geometry)[,1],
    lat = ~st_coordinates(geometry)[,2],
    label = ~label_text,
    labelOptions = labelOptions(
      noHide = TRUE,
      direction = "center",
      textOnly = TRUE,
      style = list(
        "color" = "#222",
        "font-size" = "10px",
        "font-weight" = "bold",
        "text-shadow" = "1px 1px #ffffff"
      )
    )
  ) %>%
  addLegend(pal = pal, values = ~total_permits, title = "Total permits for Idaho (1980 - 2010)")

Leaflet | © OpenStreetMap contributors © CARTO

Map for Total Number of Single-Building Permits in each State in the United State.

Code 
# load the US states from USAboundaries package.
us_states_sf <- us_states(resolution = "low")

# rename the state column to statefp.
us_single_fam_permit1 <- us_single_fam_permit %>% 
  rename(statefp = state)

# convert statefp column to integer
us_states_sf$statefp <- as.integer(us_states_sf$statefp)

# merge spatial and permit data
merged_data <- us_states_sf %>%
  left_join(us_single_fam_permit1, by = "statefp")

merged_data <- merged_data %>% 
  group_by(statefp, name)

merged_data <- merged_data %>% 
    summarize(state_total_permits = sum(value, na.rm = TRUE))

# extract state centriods to place text labels.
state_labels <-merged_data %>% 
  st_centroid() %>% 
  mutate(label_text = paste0(name))

# create a color palatte
pal <- colorNumeric(
  palette = "OrRd", 
  domain = merged_data$state_total_permits,
  na.color = "transparent" 
)
Code 
# creating visualization
leaflet(merged_data) %>%
  addProviderTiles("CartoDB.Positron") %>%
  addPolygons(
    fillColor = ~pal(state_total_permits),
    weight = 0.3,
    color = "#333",
    fillOpacity = 0.8,
    smoothFactor = 0.2,
    label = ~paste0(name, ": ", scales::comma(state_total_permits)),
    highlightOptions = highlightOptions(weight = 1, color = "black", bringToFront = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  addLabelOnlyMarkers(
    data = state_labels,
    lng = ~st_coordinates(geometry)[,1],
    lat = ~st_coordinates(geometry)[,2],
    label = ~label_text,
    labelOptions = labelOptions(
      noHide = TRUE,
      direction = "center",
      textOnly = TRUE,
      style = list(
        "color" = "#222",
        "font-size" = "10px",
        "font-weight" = "bold",
        "text-shadow" = "1px 1px #ffffff"
      )
    )
  ) %>%
  addLegend(pal = pal, values = ~state_total_permits, title = "Total State Permits(1980 - 2010")

Code 
#display the amount of single-family building permit before the crisis

# rename the state column to statefp and select only the year 2005
sf_permit05 <- us_single_fam_permit %>% 
  group_by(state, StateAbbr) %>% 
  rename(statefp = state) %>% 
  filter(year %in% 2005) %>% 
  summarise(total_perm05 = sum(value, na.rm = TRUE))

# merged data
merged_data05 <- us_states_sf %>%
  left_join(sf_permit05, by = "statefp") %>% 
  group_by(statefp, state_abbr)

# extract state centriods to place text labels.
state_label05 <-merged_data05 %>% 
  st_centroid() %>% 
  mutate(label_text = paste0(name))

# create a color palatte
pal05 <- colorNumeric(
  palette = "YlOrRd", 
  domain = merged_data05$total_perm05,
  na.color = "transparent" 
)
Code 
# creating visualization
leaflet(merged_data05) %>%
  addProviderTiles("CartoDB.Positron") %>%
  addPolygons(
    fillColor = ~pal05(total_perm05),
    weight = 0.3,
    color = "#333",
    fillOpacity = 0.8,
    smoothFactor = 0.2,
    label = ~paste0(name, ": ", scales::comma(total_perm05)),
    highlightOptions = highlightOptions(weight = 1, color = "black", bringToFront = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  addLabelOnlyMarkers(
    data = state_labels,
    lng = ~st_coordinates(geometry)[,1],
    lat = ~st_coordinates(geometry)[,2],
    label = ~label_text,
    labelOptions = labelOptions(
      noHide = TRUE,
      direction = "center",
      textOnly = TRUE,
      style = list(
        "color" = "#222",
        "font-size" = "10px",
        "font-weight" = "bold",
        "text-shadow" = "1px 1px #ffffff"
      )
    )
  ) %>%
  addLegend(pal = pal05, values = ~total_perm05, title = "Total State Permits(2005) - Before Crisis")

#display the amount of single-family building permit before the crisis

# rename the state column to statefp and select only the year 2009
sf_permit09 <- us_single_fam_permit %>%
  group_by(state, StateAbbr) %>% 
  rename(statefp = state) %>% 
  filter(year %in% 2009) %>% 
  summarise(total_perm09 = sum(value, na.rm = TRUE))

# merged data
merged_data09 <- us_states_sf %>%
  left_join(sf_permit09, by = "statefp") %>% 
  group_by(statefp, state_abbr)

# extract state centriods to place text labels.
state_label09 <-merged_data09 %>% 
  st_centroid() %>% 
  mutate(label_text = paste0(state_abbr))

# create a color palatte
pal09 <- colorNumeric(
  palette = ("OrRd"), 
  domain = merged_data09$total_perm09,
  na.color = "transparent" 
)
Code 
# creating visualization
leaflet(merged_data09) %>%
  addProviderTiles("CartoDB.Positron") %>%
  addPolygons(
    fillColor = ~pal09(total_perm09),
    weight = 0.3,
    color = "#333",
    fillOpacity = 0.8,
    smoothFactor = 0.2,
    label = ~paste0(state_abbr, ": ", scales::comma(total_perm09)),
    highlightOptions = highlightOptions(weight = 1, color = "black", bringToFront = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  addLabelOnlyMarkers(
    data = state_labels,
    lng = ~st_coordinates(geometry)[,1],
    lat = ~st_coordinates(geometry)[,2],
    label = ~label_text,
    labelOptions = labelOptions(
      noHide = TRUE,
      direction = "center",
      textOnly = TRUE,
      style = list(
        "color" = "#222",
        "font-size" = "10px",
        "font-weight" = "bold",
        "text-shadow" = "1px 1px #ffffff"
      )
    )
  ) %>%
  addLegend(pal = pal09, values = ~total_perm09, title = "Total State Permits(2009) - After Crisis")

+−
Total State Permits(2009) - After Crisis

Leaflet | © OpenStreetMap contributors © CARTO

We’ll color the states by percentage drop in permits from 2005 to 2009

Code 
# aggregate state-level totals 
state_permits <- us_single_fam_permit %>% 
  group_by(state, year, StateAbbr) %>% 
  summarize(total_sf = sum(value, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

# rename state column to statefp
state_permits <-  state_permits %>% 
  rename(statefp = state)

# get state boundaries
state_sf <- us_states() %>% 
  st_transform(4326)

# select key years to reveal the collapse
years_to_map <- c(2005, 2009)

permit_shots <- state_permits %>% 
  filter(year %in% years_to_map) %>% 
  pivot_wider(names_from = year, values_from = total_sf, names_prefix = "permits_") %>% 
  mutate(change_pct = 100 * (permits_2009 - permits_2005) / permits_2005)

permit_shots$statefp <- as.character(permit_shots$statefp)

# merge spatial and permit data
states_merged <- left_join(state_sf, permit_shots, by = "statefp")

# create the leaflet map
pal <- colorNumeric(
  palette = "OrRd",
  domain = states_merged$change_pct
)

leaflet(states_merged) %>%
  addProviderTiles("CartoDB.Positron") %>%
  addPolygons(
    fillColor = ~pal(change_pct),
    fillOpacity = 0.7,
    weight = 1,
    color = "white",
    label = ~paste0(name, ": ", round(change_pct, 1), "% change"),
    highlightOptions = highlightOptions(weight = 2, bringToFront = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  addLabelOnlyMarkers(
    data = state_labels,
    lng = ~st_coordinates(geometry)[,1],
    lat = ~st_coordinates(geometry)[,2],
    label = ~label_text,
    labelOptions = labelOptions(
      noHide = TRUE,
      direction = "center",
      textOnly = TRUE,
      style = list(
        "color" = "#222",
        "font-size" = "10px",
        "font-weight" = "bold",
        "text-shadow" = "1px 1px #ffffff"
      )
    )
  ) %>%
  addLegend(
    pal = pal,
    values = ~change_pct,
    position = "bottomright",
    title = "% Change in Permits (2005–2009)"
  )
